{{Infobox concept
| name = Sylvan Riverseed's power
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sylvan Riverseed's power]] has a cleansing, emptying aspect when combined with [[Lindon's madra]].}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
